title: Nettar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Nettar''' were herbivores native to [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. These herd animals were the main prey of vicious [[Stalker lizard/Legends|stalker lizards]].<ref name="CotG">''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-06-XX -->''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]''
